headline: Starbucks launches trendy drinks in grocery, convenience stores
summary: Starbucks has long been an innovator in the coffee space. The chain, for example, reinvented frozen coffee with the Frappuccino, and it made cold foam a fixture in coffee shops. Now, the chain has become an innovator in a new space, feeding into the growing trend of consumers wanting more protein. ...

headline: 70% of single Americans would go on a first date at a fast-food restaurant—here's the most popular spot
summary: Chick-fil-A is the most popular fast-food restaurant for first dates. A psychology expert explains why a cheap romantic meal is becoming the newest dating trend.

headline: Schlotzsky’s rebrands, launches new prototype
summary: The chain’s latest store design features self-order kiosks, a designated pickup area and a smaller footprint to slash operating costs by up to 25%.
